study_title: Exoskeleton development comparison between three bees species: Apis mellifera, Frieseomelitta varia and Centri analis
exp_title: RNA-seq raw reads of bees: Apis mellifera NE phase
design: Sequencing was performed in the Central Laboratory of High Performance Technologies (LaCTAD) facility. The libraries were prepared using the  Illumina TruSeq RNA Sample Preparation Kit v2, where Oligo-dT beads are used to capture polyA tails. The layout was paired-end (2x100 base pairs), with six libraries per lane.
center: Hospital de Clinicas de Porto Alegre
